start_app = None

    def test_full_session_lifecycle(start_app):
        # ---- Step 4: create alice's session ----
        alice = requests.Session()
        now_before = int(time.time())
        r = alice.post(
            f"{BASE_URL}/api/sessions",
            json={"userId": "alice"},
            headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
            timeout=10,
        )
        now_after = int(time.time())
